body:
This PR only includes a few commits in #1263, to see where things are going wrong.

This PR attempts to speed up the inertial gravity wave examples by:
 - Adding `@inbounds` to loops
 - Returning nothing to ensure no allocations occur by returning fields
 - Adding function barriers before hot loops
 - Moving hot loops to beginning of file to help prevent closures over globals.
 - Using the function-based map in the rho unit to make the loop thread safe
 - Add multi threading to the rho init
title: Speed up inertial gravity wave examples (part of #1263)
